workstream: B — Qwen3-30B-A3B seed-matched expert_offload A/B on Blackwell sm_120
device: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition (sm_120, 96GB, 600W)
shared_config: seed=42, max_steps=150, eval_steps=50, seq_len=2048, sample_packing, grad_accum=4, micro_batch=1, lr=1e-4 cosine, r=8 alpha=16, attn-only LoRA(q,k,v,o), quantize_moe_experts=true, flash_attention=false(SDPA)
single_variable: expert_offload false(resident) vs true(offload) — configs differ ONLY by that + output_dir + wandb_name
prior_baseline_A2000: OLMoE-1B-7B(sm_86): resident peak 6.00GB / offload 2.60GB; Qwen3-30B resident OOM'd on 12GB

qwen30b_offload.homed_line: homed 96 expert layers across 48 MoE blocks (14.50 GB) to pinned CPU RAM; one block resident on cuda:0 at a time.
